about.title: Three decades of dental craftsmanship
about.subtitle: From a single lab in Amman to a fully digital manufacturing partner trusted by dentists across the region.

founded.title: Founded
founded.body: AG Dental Lab was founded by Abdullatif Ghatasheh.

digital.title: Digital Pioneer
digital.body: First dental lab in Jordan using digital CAD/CAM zirconia.

rebrand.title: AG Dental Lab
rebrand.body: Rebranded and became AG Dental Lab.

services.title: A complete dental portfolio
services.subtitle: Every restoration produced in-house, combining traditional craftsmanship with digital workflows - from impression or scan to delivery.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We are committed to providing integrated dental services — combining traditional techniques with digital technology — including dental restorations, zirconia milling, precision metal fabrication, 3D printing, and technical support for dentists.
mission.p2: Built on 30+ years of expertise and global quality standards, we deliver precise, reliable, and innovative solutions that improve clinical success and patient satisfaction.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.p1: To become the leading regional reference in integrated dental solutions by combining 30+ years of expertise with both traditional craftsmanship and advanced digital manufacturing technologies.
vision.p2: We aim to elevate dental care quality and deliver better outcomes for dentists and patients.

work.title: Craftsmanship you can see
work.subtitle: A curated selection of real cases — from single restorations to full-arch rehabilitations.

gallery.subtitle: A selection of real cases from our lab.

cases.title: Full-Arch Implant-Supported Prosthesis
cases.description: Complete full-mouth rehabilitation: screw-retained, implant-supported fixed prostheses for both the upper and lower arches, built on a precision titanium framework.

cases.title: Implant-Supported Interior Bridge with Gingival Ceramic
cases.description: Implant-supported interior bridge combining natural tooth shade with pink ceramic gingiva to restore both teeth and soft-tissue contour for a natural smile line.

cases.title: Interior Restoration, Bisque Stage
cases.description: Interior restoration on the working model at the bisque stage, highlighting layered porcelain translucency prior to final characterization and glazing.

cases.title: Final Clinical Result
cases.description: Final clinical outcome: the cemented restoration in the patient's mouth, showing natural shade matching, contour, and a confident, healthy smile.

cases.title: Interior Veneers, Final Result
cases.description: Ultra-thin porcelain veneers bonded to the upper front teeth, delivering a bright, uniform shade and natural tooth proportions for a confident, healthy smile.

cases.title: Interior Crowns/Veneers on Master Model
cases.description: Interior crown and veneer case on the master model, showing bright, uniform shade selection and precise anatomical contouring.

cases.title: Full-Arch Implant Bridge
cases.description: Side profile of a full-arch implant bridge, revealing the internal metal substructure that provides rigidity and long-term stability.

cases.title: Interior Zirconia Bridge
cases.description: Interior zirconia bridge showcasing fine surface texture and gradient shading from the gumline to the incisal edge, finished with a natural, glossy surface.

cases.title: Lower Interior Zirconia Bridge
cases.description: Full-contour zirconia bridge for the lower interior teeth, featuring natural incisal translucency and a precisely blended pink gingival shade for a seamless, lifelike restoration.

cases.title: Posterior PFM Crowns
cases.description: Posterior porcelain-fused-to-metal (PFM) crown unit, built on a precious-metal coping and layered with porcelain for high durability and a natural chewing-surface finish.

why.title: The partner dentists rely on
why.subtitle: Built for clinicians who need dependable communication, clean workflows, and restoration quality that stays consistent from one case to the next.

reasons.title: Predictable Quality
reasons.body: Consistent, repeatable results on every single case.

reasons.title: Pioneer in Jordan
reasons.body: First lab in Jordan to adopt digital CAD/CAM zirconia.

reasons.title: Trusted Warranty
reasons.body: Confidence backed by a dependable guarantee.

reasons.title: Direct Communication
reasons.body: Talk straight to the lab, no middlemen.

reasons.title: Ongoing Follow-up
reasons.body: We stay with each case until it's perfect.

reasons.title: Long-Term Partnership
reasons.body: We grow together with our dentist partners.

reasons.title: Integrated Digital System
reasons.body: One seamless workflow from scan to delivery.

contact.title: Let's craft perfect smiles together
contact.subtitle: Partner with a lab that treats your cases like its own. Reach out or track an existing case in seconds.

footer.tagline: Your Partner in Perfect Smiles. A dental laboratory delivering precise, reliable, and innovative solutions since 1994.
footer.rights: Copyright {year} AG Dental Lab. All rights reserved.

track.title: Track your case in seconds
track.subtitle: Enter the tracking ID provided by the lab to view real-time status and the full production timeline. No account required.
track.readyBody: Enter the case tracking ID provided by AG Dental Lab to view status, dates, notes, and production progress.
track.noStagePhotos: No photos were uploaded for this stage.
track.stageNotReached: This stage hasn't been reached yet.
track.processingBody: Your case has been received and is being processed.
track.noSteps: No production steps have been recorded yet.
